---
title: "rtables - Complex Table Layouts"
---

## Overview

`rtables` provides a framework for creating complex tables for regulatory submissions.

## Installation

```{r}
#| eval: false
install.packages("rtables")
```

## Basic Example

```{r}
#| eval: false
library(rtables)

# Basic table layout
lyt <- basic_table() %>%
  split_cols_by("ARM") %>%
  analyze("AGE", afun = mean)

# Build the table
# build_table(lyt, data = adsl)
```

## Resources

- [rtables documentation](https://insightsengineering.github.io/rtables/)

## Experiments

*Add your experiments here...*
